In this video I'm going to be showing you how to block negative comments and your ads. First thing you want to go to is jump into your business manager, pull up the settings, go to business settings here. Once this pulls up for you, you're going to go to pages under the account section on the left. From there you'll want to go to view page, top right corner here. Click on that. It will send you straight to that page that you're using for your business ad account. Once you have this populated, you're going to go to the settings section right here at the top white menu here. From there you're going to be able to scroll down to page moderation. Click edit and go ahead and plug in that list that we have populated right below the video. It may only allow you to have eight or so in at a time, but it probably only take a couple minutes. You can also upload it through a CSV file. If you're having issues as well, try to take out the comments before you input them. If you're still having issues, please reach out to our tech team. Hope that helps.
